violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) was observed with an accumulation of black residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/09/2026

Juice and dressings were observed held at 46 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/09/2026
Refrigerator located in the front area was not in good repair, ambient observed at 45F. PIC took until out of service at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/09/2026
The dumpster area has an accumulation of litter, leaf litter, and debris. The dumpster area must be maintained clean to prevent harborage for pests. New Violation. Correct By: 02/09/2026

Milk was observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Inspector determined that placing several containers of hot coffee in refrigeration unit may raise ambient temperature of unit and affect other foods within it. PIC moved all TCS foods to walk-in cooler at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2024

Reduced oxygen packaged (ROP) fish was observed thawing in sealed bags. Fish must be removed from its ROP state when thawing to allow for adequate oxygen transfer rate. All fish was at 32 degrees Fahrenheit at time of inspection and did not need to be disposed. All fish was removed from ROP state at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2024

The presence of flies is not controlled as evidenced by large flies observed in dining, prep, and storage areas. A large amount of flies were observed in dumpster area as well. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the deli sliver have an accumulation of food debris. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2024
The outside dumpsters were not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2024

The drain plugs for the outside dumpsters are missing. Drains in receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must have drain plugs in place. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2024

The: 1.floors and walls in the warewashing area 2.ceiling throughout kitchen area 3.shelves in kitchen and front counter area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/20/2023
